hero.title: A System, Not a Campaign.
hero.subtitle: Marketing, sales, delivery, and retention should work as one system — not four departments with four dashboards. We help you build that system.

tiers.name: Align
tiers.subtitle: See Clearly. Fix First.
tiers.description: A focused 90-day engagement to diagnose where your revenue system is losing momentum, establish clear positioning, and make the first high-impact improvements.
includes: Prioritized action plan based on actual system conditions

tiers.name: Build
tiers.subtitle: Activate the Engine.
tiers.description: A 6-month partnership to install the operating layer your business is missing — structured follow-through, automated signals, and clear handoffs between teams.
includes: Operating system for visibility and automation
Automated signal capture across the buyer journey
Recurring operating reviews tied to real signals

tiers.name: Command
tiers.subtitle: Own It. Run It. Scale It.
tiers.description: A 12-month engagement to strengthen governance, simplify your tool stack, and make your commercial system durable enough to run without outside help.
includes: System documentation and data model hardening
Transition planning for full team independence

phases.name: Align
phases.description: Diagnose the current system. Identify the biggest sources of friction. Build the first action plan.
milestones: Revenue system diagnostic across all five stages
Identify weak handoffs, missing proof, and structural gaps
Restructure the website for buyer evaluation
Deliver a prioritized roadmap based on real conditions

phases.name: Build
phases.description: Install the operating layer. Create visibility, automate follow-through, and connect the teams.
milestones: Create a shared source of truth across teams
Automate signal capture across the buyer journey
Improve handoffs between marketing, sales, delivery, and retention
Build structured follow-up that continues conversations naturally
Establish operating reviews tied to real buyer and customer signals

phases.name: Command
phases.description: Strengthen governance. Simplify the stack. Hand the system to your team to own and improve.
milestones: Define shared rules, stage definitions, and ownership
Rationalize the tool stack to serve the operating model
Document the system and harden the data model
Prepare transition planning for full independence
Build a system that improves without relying on heroics
